build.buildCommand: pip install -r requirements.txt && PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=/app/.pw-browsers playwright install chromium && apt-get install -y libasound2t64 libatk1.0-0 libatk-bridge2.0-0 libcups2 libdrm2 libgbm1 libgtk-3-0 libnspr4 libnss3 libxcomposite1 libxdamage1 libxfixes3 libxkbcommon0 libxrandr2 xvfb || true
